purpose: Present quantitative information through charts, tables, and visualizations that reveal patterns and trends.
writingRules: Every chart must have a title that states the insight, not just the data
Axes must be labelled with units and source
Raw data must be accessible (table or download)
Highlight the most important data point in text
Do not mislead with axis manipulation or cherry-picked ranges
seoRules: Key numbers should be in paragraph text for featured snippets
Alt text on charts must describe the trend, not just the chart type
